rules.rationale: Prompt asks the agent to access the network without confirmation.
rules.remediation: Ask for explicit approval before external network access.

rules.rationale: Command uploads build or audit artifacts to an external destination.
rules.remediation: Confirm the upload target and remove sensitive audit data before transfer.

rules.rationale: Output may contain a cmux workspace or session identifier.
rules.remediation: Redact session identifiers before sharing logs.
